_note: Sanitized recorded values behind two historical worked examples. This file is the single source for the figures. 'Representative' means stubbed-harness input, not a live A/B. 'Live' means an operator-recorded small-n smoke summary; its raw per-attempt outcomes are not published.

bootstrap.note: Seeded percentile bootstrap over paired per-task success deltas. A fixed seed makes recomputation deterministic when raw paired outcomes are available.

capability_summary.note: Descriptive representative input only; no role change is authorized.

promotion_gate_cases.name: representative refusal
promotion_gate_cases.reason: Historical helper refuses because the bootstrap CI lower bound, 0, does not exceed the configured 0.10 margin. No error-control or model-quality claim is made.

promotion_gate_cases.name: live smoke
promotion_gate_cases.provenance: live (small-n: 4 tasks x 2 replicates; carried a transport artifact)
promotion_gate_cases.reason: Historical path returned NO-GO; latency_slo was n/a and the must-not-break check failed. The summary is small-n, transport-confounded, and lacks public raw attempts, so no model-quality inference is made.
